message:
test(fcp-core): pin PrincipalId equality + Display/FromStr roundtrip across kinds (qc2pq)

Add crates/fcp-core/tests/principal_id_kinds_roundtrip.rs pinning
PrincipalId Eq/Hash/Display/FromStr stability across the three
documented principal kinds (user / agent / service). 12/12 tests
pass: Display verbatim emission, Display→FromStr round-trip
preserves Eq + Hash, idempotent repeat formatting, equality + hash
across new/try_from/parse/clone construction paths, cross-kind
distinctness (user:alice vs agent:alice vs service:alice), AsRef +
as_str + Display agreement, HashMap-key correctness, validation
rejection of empty/uppercase/non-ASCII/whitespace/NUL/leading-
separator forms, serde JSON quoted-canonical-id round-trip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
